ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's details */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "header_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's header picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is verified */,
  "private_account" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is private */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Token for password reset */,
  "password_reset_expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration time of the password reset token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dweets" (
  "dweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Dweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the Dweet */,
  "dweet_text" TEXT /* Text content of the Dweet */,
  "dweet_img" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the Dweet (if any) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the Dweet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the Dweet */,
  " replied_to_dweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Dweet being replied to (if any) */,
  "retweet_of_dweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Dweet being retweeted (if any) */,
  "dweet_type" TEXT /* Type of the Dweet (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity of the Dweet content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "dweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Dweet being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the Dweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the like was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of like (e.g., normal, super) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_dweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("dweet_id") REFERENCES dweets ("dweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Dweet being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "replied_to_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_dweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("dweet_id") REFERENCES dweets ("dweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_likes" (
  "comment_like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment like event */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the like was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow event */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who follows another user */,
  "followed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the follow event occurred */,
  "notify" INTEGER /* Whether the follower wants to receive notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_followed_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., like, comment) */,
  "dweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Dweet related to the notification (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_dweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("dweet_id") REFERENCES dweets ("dweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Dweet being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting the Dweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_dweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("dweet_id") REFERENCES dweets ("dweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
